title: docs: 5 headline commands documented in the README 'What it does' table and shipped as npm scripts (chaos, flows, …
description:
[P1 · docs · audit] 5 headline commands documented in the README 'What it does' table and shipped as npm scripts (chaos, flows, visual, perf, brain) are NOT wired into the CLI dispatcher — running them errors. The flagship 'Brain analysis' section documents a command the bin cannot run.

Evidence: grep of src/cli/index.ts case labels shows only schema:*, contracts*, mock:*, catalog:*, atlas:*, registry:scan, quality:check, doctor, all. Probe: sentinel chaos|flows|visual|perf|brain each exit 1 'Unknown command'. README.md:29-33,405-408 claim these commands.

Fix: Either add dispatcher cases wiring src/chaos, src/flows, src/visual, src/perf, src/brain (modules exist), or remove/mark-as-internal the unimplemented commands from README + package.json scripts.

Source: launch-readiness audit 2026-06-18
